labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 532112 ($1,221,302,646) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 532112 ($14,404,385,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

occupations.title: Bus and Truck Mechanics and Diesel Engine Specialists
First-Line Supervisors of Retail Sales Workers

n_band.derivation: margin 0.3000 (margins.json[532]: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results); revenue/employee $1,630,193 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 532112); class <5: 270 firms, avg revenue/firm $949,537 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $284,861 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 56 firms, avg revenue/firm $4,670,089 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,401,027 -> IN $1-10M band; class 10-19: 21 firms, avg revenue/firm $12,404,810 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $3,721,443 -> IN $1-10M band; class 20-99: 30 firms, avg revenue/firm $28,981,200 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $8,694,360 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 15 firms, avg revenue/firm $125,156,000 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $37,546,800 -> out of $1-10M band; class 500+: 14 firms, avg revenue/firm $777,086,286 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $233,125,886 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 107
n_band.margin_source: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results
